mapper.select: select pf.id as favoriteId, pf.create_time as favoriteTime, p.id as promptId, p.title as Title, p.content as content, p.tags as tags, p.view_count as viewCount, p.like_count as likeCount, p.favorite_count as favoriteCount, p.copy_count as copyCount, p.user_id as userId, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName from prompt_favorite pf inner join prompt p on pf.prompt_id = p.id left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where pf.user_id = #{userId} and p.deleted = 0 and c.deleted = 0 order by pf.create_time desc
